title: Motor Proof Job #1 — production SHA attribution probe (apex/www//motors/) and divergence report
verdict: NONE — builder does not self-certify; author != verifier required for any PASS.
laws: FOUNDER_CANON v1 + governed-autorun v3. Violations = BLOCKED_WITH_REASON.

serving_architecture.apex: https://noetfield.com -> HTTP 308 permanent redirect -> https://www.noetfield.com (both / and /motors/)
serving_architecture.www: Cloudflare edge worker noetfield-www-proxy (route www.noetfield.com/*) -> Pages origin https://noetfield-www.pages.dev
serving_architecture.deploy_execution: Noetfield repo infra/cf-www-proxy/ (worker) + Cloudflare Pages project noetfield-www (content)
serving_architecture.mechanisms: TWO distinct release surfaces: (1) Pages content deployment, (2) worker proxy release stamp

probes.note: empty body (sha256 of empty string); permanent redirect

probes.title: Noetfield Systems Inc. — AI Motors & Governed Execution
AI Motors for Governed Execution — Noetfield Systems

probes.note: byte-identical to www homepage; origin sends no x-noetfield-* headers, no noindex

findings: Apex noetfield.com does not serve content: HTTP 308 permanent redirect to www for / and /motors/. An observer probing apex without following redirects (or with a stale cached redirect target) sees different results than one probing www — plausible cause of the reported observer disagreement (hypothesis, not proven).
Production www content is byte-identical (sha256) to the current noetfield-www.pages.dev production deployment on both probed paths — the worker proxy is a content pass-through.

The only SHA-grade serving marker observable externally is the worker header x-noetfield-release: e0165192cd625366bb95a8f682db14e1facff58f, which DOES NOT EQUAL candidate defb5506677d4f5b88178b027b7ba6604ea47c42. Whether it stamps the worker release or the content release is not determinable from outside the Noetfield repo.
Live titles match the NEW content (AI Motors & Governed Execution), but per job law content appearance is NOT attribution and closes nothing.

Anomalies on production www: x-robots-tag: noindex (production homepage is asking search engines not to index) and no-store cache-control injected by the proxy layer. Consistent with the proxy fronting a preview-configured artifact; requires Noetfield-repo-side verification.

attribution.deployed_production_sha: UNKNOWN — Pages deployment id -> git SHA mapping requires Cloudflare API or Noetfield repo deploy records, neither available in this session
attribution.action: STOP per instruction — MOTOR-WEB-001 not closed; promotion/outcome remain DIVERGED

blockers: motor/registry/ (jobs/MOTOR-WEB-001.json, validate.py v1.2) does not exist on Noetfield-Systems/noetfeld-os origin/main or any remote branch — it exists only on the founder's local machine; steps 2/6/7 cannot execute in this environment until it is committed and pushed
add_repo for Noetfield-Systems/Noetfield requires an approval that was not granted in-session — PR #115 workflow runs, infra/cf-www-proxy/ and the social-preview receipt are unreachable
no Cloudflare API credentials in this environment — Pages deployment id and deployed SHA cannot be read directly

founder_deploy_request.gate: FOUNDER-GATED — builder requests, founder executes; nothing here is self-authorized
founder_deploy_request.request: Run ONE exact-main production deployment of Cloudflare Pages project noetfield-www from Noetfield-Systems/Noetfield at the exact candidate/merge SHA, and capture a deploy receipt
receipt_must_capture: source git SHA (40-hex) the artifact was built from
deploy completion UTC timestamp (outcome probe must be >= 60s later)
also_verify_on_noetfield_side: what x-noetfield-release stamps (worker release vs content release) and re-point it at the content deployment SHA if it does not already reflect it
why production www serves x-robots-tag: noindex and no-store — likely proxy misconfiguration fronting preview settings
the social-preview receipt drift (receipt lives in Noetfield repo or local motor registry; not present in noetfeld-os)

next_steps_after_founder_deploy: Wait >= 60s; re-probe apex+www / and /motors/ no-cache; record hashes+markers; confirm deployed SHA == candidate SHA; only then update MOTOR-WEB-001.json (promotion PROVEN, outcome PROVEN, production_sha, cost.metered=true, receipt_hash, RECEIPT_COMPLETE) and run motor/registry/validate.py to exit 0.
